properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 V3 V4 V5 V6

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Before I spoke a word, You were singing over me You have been so, so good to me Before I took a breath, You breathed Your life in me You have been so, so kind to me

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Oh, the overwhelming, never-ending, reckless love of God Oh, it chases me down, fights'til I'm found, leaves the ninety-nine I couldn't earn it, I don't deserve it, still You give Yourself away Oh, the overwhelming, never-ending, reckless love of God

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: When I was Your foe, still Your love fought for me You have been so, so good to me When I felt no worth, You paid it all for me You have been so, so kind to me

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Oh, the overwhelming, never-ending, reckless love of God Oh, it chases me down, fights'til I'm found, leaves the ninety-nine I couldn't earn it, I don't deserve it, still You give Yourself away Oh, the overwhelming, never-ending, reckless love of God

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: There's no shadow You won't light up Mountain You won't climb up Coming after me There's no wall You won't kick down Lie You won't tear down Coming after me

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: Oh, the overwhelming, never-ending, reckless love of God Oh, it chases me down, fights'til I'm found, leaves the ninety-nine I couldn't earn it, I don't deserve it, still You give Yourself away Oh, the overwhelming, never-ending, reckless love of God
